assignments.description: Used to count the filtered records so we know if any existing contract budget categories were found. A

assignments.description: Combines the Account number and budget category name into one value to be used in a picklist.

assignments.description: Used to collect all of the picklist values into one collection to be used in a picklist.

decisions.description: Looks at the collection varialbe in for the Screen Admin Account # Selection. There can potentially be a blank value if they entered an amount and then deleted it.

rules.label: Copy 2 of Contract and Contract Budget Category Amounts do no match

Flow.description: 12/1/25 AH - Changing how the user is directed own each of the pathes and adding creating records on Contract Budget Category object. 11/19/25 SB - Convert on page screen flow to a quick action | Add Budget Category and Description mapping | Add edit success verbiage and close out instructions
Flow.label: [Screen Flow] Set Reimbursement Codes

loops.name: Loop_Contract_Budget_Categories_to_Total
loops.label: Loop Contract Budget Categories to Total

loops.name: Loop_Filtered_Existing_Contact_Budget_Categories
loops.label: Loop Filtered Existing Contact Budget Categories

recordLookups.label: Check for 'Per Unit' Reimbursements w/ Acct #

recordUpdates.name: Update_Contract_Budget_Category_Per_Unit
recordUpdates.label: Update Contract Budget Category Not Per Unit

fields.name: Account_Codes_Captured_msg
fields.fieldText: The entered Account Numbers and Amounts are in the table below.

fields.name: AccountNo_selection_dsp
fields.fieldText:
For each listed Account Number, enter the dollar amount you wish to allocate to the Account Number.


Ensure that the total of all allocated amounts equals ${!Get_Contract.Total_Funding__c}.


When entering an amount in the table, make sure to enter the amount that needs to be allocated to this Account Number. Once you have entered the amount, press Enter to save it to the cell. Then, once you have entered all your amounts, click Save.

fields.name: AccountNo_selection_New_dsp
fields.fieldText:
For each listed Account Number, enter the dollar amount you wish to allocate to the Account Number.


Ensure that the total of all allocated amounts equals ${!Get_Contract.Total_Funding__c}.


When entering an amount in the table, make sure to enter the amount that needs to be allocated to this Account Number. Once you have entered the amount, click the Apply button or press Enter on your keyboard if Apply does not appear. Please make sure to select all rows with an amount. Then, once you have entered all your amounts, click Save.

fields.name: Amount_Entered_Error_msg
fields.fieldText:
The total amount you have entered for all of the Account Numbers {!varAmountAdded} must be equal to the amount allocated to the contract ${!Get_Contract.Total_Funding__c}.


Please return to the previous screen and update your amounts.

fields.name: Copy_1_of_Amount_Entered_Error_msg_New
fields.fieldText:
The total amount you have entered for all of the Account Numbers {!varAmountAdded} does not match the Contract Allocated amount of ${!Get_Contract.Total_Funding__c} for this contract.


Please return to the previous screen and update your amounts.

fields.name: dt_Success
fields.fieldText:
✅ Reimbursement {!var_ReimbursmentName} has been successfully updated! You may close this window when you’re done.

﻿

fields.name: dt_EditInstructions
fields.fieldText: Use the table below to select the reimbursement record for which you would like to update the Account #.

value.stringValue: Name:159, Account__c:124, Output_Name_frm__c:208, Description__c:265, Amount_Requested_for_This_Output__c:248, Total_Number_of_Units__c:183, Unit_of_Service_Cost__c:187
Name:true, Account__c:false, Output_Name_frm__c:false, Description__c:true, Amount_Requested_for_This_Output__c:false, Total_Number_of_Units__c:false, Unit_of_Service_Cost__c:false

fields.name: dt_EditInstructions2
fields.fieldText: Please refer to the table below to select the appropriate Account # for the reimbursement record above, then click Update.

fields.name: dt_Finish
fields.fieldText: ✅ All Account #s have been successfully assigned to the “per unit” reimbursement records.

fields.name: Municipal_msg
fields.fieldText: Your budgets are Municipal so you do not need to do anything at this time.

fields.name: dt_NoPerUnits
fields.fieldText: You are not able to assign Account Numbers to this contract at this time.

fields.name: dt_Instructions
fields.fieldText: Please refer to the table below to select the appropriate Account # for the reimbursement record above, then click Next.

fields.name: UpdateSumaryText_msg
fields.fieldText: The table below is a list of all of the Account Numbers and Amounts with with updates.

variables.description: Used to hold all account codes along with the current amount allocated to each code.
variables.name: colAccountCodeWtihAmount

variables.description: Used to hold the Account# and Budget Category values
variables.name: varPicklistValueBuild
